title: Process customer complaints in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Process customer complaints in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Clarify nature of complaint

pcs.text: Details of complaint are established1.2 Summary of complaint is documented accurately1.3 Initial explanations about process and apologies appropriate to individual customer’s situation are conveyed to customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Details of complaint are established1.2 Summary of complaint is documented accurately1.3 Initial explanations about process and apologies appropriate to individual customer’s situation are conveyed to customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Details of complaint are established1.2 Summary of complaint is documented accurately1.3 Initial explanations about process and apologies appropriate to individual customer’s situation are conveyed to customer.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Clarify nature of complaint

elements.title: Identify options to resolve complaint

pcs.text: Possible options for resolving complaint are identified according to workplace procedures2.2 Solutions outside individual level of responsibility are referred to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Possible options for resolving complaint are identified according to workplace procedures2.2 Solutions outside individual level of responsibility are referred to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Possible options for resolving complaint are identified according to workplace procedures2.2 Solutions outside individual level of responsibility are referred to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify options to resolve complaint

elements.title: Act to resolve complaint

pcs.text: Chosen solution is outlined to customer according to workplace procedures3.2 Chosen solution is implemented within required timeframe and conditions are negotiated with customer3.3 Complaint is referred to supervisor if resolution is not possible or where additional levels of authorisation are required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Chosen solution is outlined to customer according to workplace procedures3.2 Chosen solution is implemented within required timeframe and conditions are negotiated with customer3.3 Complaint is referred to supervisor if resolution is not possible or where additional levels of authorisation are required?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Act to resolve complaint

elements.title: Provide feedback on complaint resolution process

pcs.text: Effectiveness of complaint resolution solution is assessed against customer feedback4.2 Changes required to improve complaint resolution procedures are identified and passed on to supervisor for consideration according to workplace procedures4.3 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
